ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the station location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the station location */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude of the station location */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "ksed_oxy" REAL /* Ksed oxy value */,
  "fsed_oxy" REAL /* Fsed oxy value */,
  "fsed_oxy_1" REAL /* Fsed oxy 1 value */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean square error (RMSE) value */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of measurement (e.g., oxygen levels, temperature) */,
  "measurement_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Frequency of measurement collection */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_frequency_id") REFERENCES measurement_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., mg/L, Celsius) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., discrete, continuous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval between measurements (e.g., 1 hour, 30 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_measurements" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "measurement_id")
)
